case_title: INVESTMENT RETREIVERS, INC VS. RUTILLO A RIVAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETREIVERS, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIVAS, RUTILLO A $19,189.43 PRINCIPAL, $2,250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,287.05 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,161.48, SEE SCANNED DOC
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETREIVERS, INC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100014896), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF INVESTMENT RETREIVERS, INC SERVED MAR-16-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-27-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS, RUTILLO A
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-06-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $435.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100027807) AS TO DEFENDANT RIVAS, RUTILLO A
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-06-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
